search_queries_used: site:asahq.org postanesthetic care pain assessment recovery
site:rcoa.ac.uk day surgery pain scoring recovery
site:doh.gov.ae day surgery recovery pain assessment
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for PACU pain documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for PACU pain documentation
rejection_reasons: Medicine and treatment decisions require patient-specific assessment.
The candidate source category "automatic pain-treatment protocols" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients recovering from anesthesia or sedation who undergo pain assessment.
setting_applicability: Direct for PACU pain documentation; diagnosis and treatment remain clinician-led.
UAE_applicability: International ASA evidence supported by DoH recovery requirements; UAE medicine policy remains required.
recency_verification: Official ASA 2013 guideline, current ASA 2024 standard, DoH V1/2024, and RCoA GPAS 2025 were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer full ASA practice guideline was identified; newer standards were also reviewed.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA section supports periodic pain assessment during recovery; it does not determine etiology, acceptable pain, or analgesic management.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports periodic documented respiratory, cardiovascular, neurologic or mental, temperature, pain, nausea or vomiting, hydration, urine-output, drainage, and bleeding observations.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for PACU pain documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Pain site, type, score, baseline, functional effect, procedure relation, medicine, dose, response, complex pain, and escalation remain unsupported unless clinician-entered.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
